podcast.title: Moiz's Morning Brief
podcast.subtitle: World news, markets, and what's new in your shows.
podcast.description: A daily 10-minute personal news brief covering Al Jazeera top stories, market moves on a personal watchlist, and new-episode summaries from a hand-picked set of podcasts.
podcast.author: Moiz

schedule.cron_note: 5:30 AM Gulf Standard Time = 1:30 AM UTC
